proposals.title: Increase validator rewards
proposals.notes: Primary example from the project spec. Exercises the from/to parser path.

proposals.title: Lower quorum requirement
proposals.text: Lower the quorum requirement for governance votes from 20% to 12% of staked tokens.
proposals.notes: Exercises the quorum classifier branch and the from/to parser path with a non-percent-of-treasury metric.

proposals.title: Increase grant program budget
proposals.text: Fund the grant program with an additional $50,000 USDC to support new ecosystem projects over the next two quarters.
proposals.notes: Exercises the absolute-amount parser path ($ + USDC) and the grant_program prompt focus.

proposals.title: Reduce protocol trading fee
proposals.text: Reduce the protocol trading fee by 0.5% to remain competitive with other DEXs.
proposals.notes: Exercises the percent-decrease parser path and the protocol_fee prompt focus.

proposals.title: Increase token emission rate
proposals.text: Increase the annual token emission rate by 15% to fund upcoming liquidity mining incentives.
proposals.notes: Exercises the percent-increase parser path and the emission prompt focus (inflationary-pressure dimensions).

proposals.title: Increase treasury spending for grants
proposals.text: Proposal to increase treasury spending by 8% to fund additional grants over the next two quarters.
proposals.notes: Used in the deployed contract's own test run (simulation id 0). Exercises the treasury prompt focus and simulate_variant, since it contains a plain percentage.

proposals.title: Raise approval threshold
proposals.text: Raise the approval threshold required to pass governance proposals from 50% to 66%.
proposals.notes: Exercises the voting_threshold classifier branch, distinct from the plain quorum keyword.

proposals.title: Increase staking reward APR
proposals.text: Increase staking rewards from 6% to 9% to encourage longer token lockups.
proposals.notes: Exercises the staking_reward classifier branch and the from/to parser path.

proposals.title: Introduce a voter reward program
proposals.text: Introduce a voter reward program that pays a small incentive to any wallet that participates in every governance vote during a quarter.
proposals.notes: Exercises the participation_incentive classifier branch. No structured percentage or amount, so parser_warnings will note that no parameters were extracted.

proposals.title: Reallocate treasury funds toward core development
proposals.text: Reallocate treasury allocation away from marketing and toward core protocol development.
proposals.notes: Exercises the treasury_allocation classifier branch, checked before the broader treasury keyword.

proposals.title: Compound proposal: treasury allocation + quorum
proposals.text: Increase treasury allocation for grants by 20% and simultaneously reduce the quorum requirement to 15% to make it easier to approve the additional spending.
proposals.notes: Deliberately compound proposal. Exercises is_compound_proposal detection (matches quorum, treasury_allocation, and treasury keywords, with quorum returned first since it is checked earliest in the classifier rule order).
